# Discord

> *"Extract my Discord auth"*

## Tools

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:START -->
| Tool | Description | Parameters |
|------|-------------|------------|
| `discord_me` | Get your Discord profile. | — |
| `discord_guilds` | List your Discord servers. | — |
| `discord_guild` | Get Discord server details. | `guild_id` |
| `discord_channels` | List channels in a Discord server. | `guild_id` |
| `discord_messages` | Read messages from a Discord channel. | `channel_id`, `limit?` |
| `discord_send` | Send a message to a Discord channel. | `channel_id`, `content` |
| `discord_channel` | Get Discord channel info. | `channel_id` |
| `discord_search` | Search messages in a Discord server. | `guild_id`, `query`, `limit?` |
| `discord_dms` | List your Discord DM channels. | — |
| `discord_read_dm` | Read DM messages. | `channel_id`, `limit?` |
| `discord_send_dm` | Send a DM to a user. | `user_id`, `content` |
| `discord_react` | Add a reaction to a message. | `channel_id`, `message_id`, `emoji` |
| `discord_unreact` | Remove a reaction from a message. | `channel_id`, `message_id`, `emoji` |
| `discord_members` | List members of a Discord server. | `guild_id`, `limit?` |
| `discord_user` | Get a Discord user's profile. | `user_id` |
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:END -->
